title: polygala pedicellata
intro: Polygala pedicellata, also known as Yin Chiao or Polygala, is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala pedicellata include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Polygala pedicellata is often combined with other herbs to create Yin Chiao, a traditional Chinese medicine formula used to treat various respiratory and immune-related disorders.
